name: Amber Aviator Lux
description: Premium aviator sunglasses crafted with a sleek golden frame and amber-tinted lenses. Designed to provide UV protection while adding a bold and timeless summer fashion statement to every outdoor look.

name: Breezy Linen Set
description: A lightweight and breathable linen outfit set tailored for maximum comfort during hot summer days. Perfect for beach vacations, casual brunches, or effortless resort-style elegance.

name: Ocean Glow Serum
description: Hydrating facial serum enriched with refreshing marine extracts to deeply nourish the skin. Leaves your face smooth, radiant, and naturally glowing throughout the sunny season.

name: Riviera Tote Bag
description: Elegant handwoven tote bag designed for stylish beach escapes and everyday summer outings. Spacious interior and durable structure make it both fashionable and practical.

name: Classic Villa Shirt
description: Relaxed-fit premium shirt inspired by Mediterranean villa aesthetics. Soft fabric, airy comfort, and timeless styling make it ideal for warm evenings and luxury casual wear.

name: Solar Shield Mist
description: Refreshing SPF protection mist created to shield your skin from harmful sun rays. Lightweight, non-sticky formula keeps you protected while feeling cool and fresh.

name: Golden Sand Slides
description: Comfortable slip-on summer slides inspired by warm sandy beach tones. Cushioned soles and modern design make them perfect for poolside walks or daily casual wear.

name: Lagoon Breeze Hat
description: Wide-brim summer hat made to keep you shaded and stylish under the sun. Lightweight and breathable material ensures comfort during travel, beach days, or outdoor events.

name: Tropical Escape Perfume
description: Fresh tropical fragrance blending citrus, coconut, and floral notes to capture the feeling of a luxurious island getaway. Long-lasting scent for day or evening wear.

name: Seaside Lounge Chair
description: Minimal wooden lounge chair designed for stylish relaxation in sunny spaces. Durable craftsmanship and modern comfort make it ideal for patios, balconies, or beach homes.
